title: Dental Implant Detection
description: A computer vision system that detects dental implant types in X-ray images using a YOLOv7-based model.
highlights: Custom object detection pipeline for dental implants
future: Expand to additional dental device classes and deploy as a web-based demo.

title: Fire Detection & Localization
description: Real-time fire and smoke detection system using YOLOv5 and OpenCV to support safety monitoring workflows.
highlights: Live camera frame processing with alerts
Fine-tuned detection model for fire and smoke
future: Integrate with IoT alert systems and mobile notifications.

title: NFL Big Data Bowl 2026
description: Predictive analytics model for NFL passing performance using XGBoost and time-aware feature engineering.
highlights: Optimized model pipeline for predictive accuracy
future: Deploy a dashboard for interactive game-data exploration.

title: Geothermal Seismic Monitoring
description: Data science analysis correlating geothermal operations with seismic activity, including risk modeling and dashboards.
highlights: Built ML models for magnitude prediction
future: Add anomaly detection and operational optimization modules.
